68:
<Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, my friend. What can I do for the savior of Ishgard?
...You seek Master Alphinaud? Ah. He came to relieve me of my vigil a short while ago.

70:
Though he would sooner faint than admit it, the boy must be exhausted by Hraesvelgr's trial and all that followed...
Estinien is blessed to have such devoted comrades.
